_comment: Allowlist for the GitHub<->HF-Space module-drift guard (a11oy). ignore_paths/ignore_extensions are excluded entirely (built SPA bundles, vendored + binary assets). accepted_divergences are KNOWN, pre-existing GitHub<->HF divergences recorded so the guard lands green; each is still printed as a warning every run. Remove an entry once the file is reconciled so any FUTURE re-divergence fails the job.

accepted_divergences.static/3d/surfaces/fabric.js: ahead=github, pending Forge redeploy of PR #445/#446 (fabric COMPUTE FABRIC surface repointed to /api/a11oy/v1/compute-pool-hardened and corrected the primary-endpoint comment to describe honest TCP-probed reachability). Live HF Space still serves the pre-fix file. Remove this entry once the box redeploys main and the OIDs reconcile.
accepted_divergences.static/3d/surfaces/governance.js: ahead=github, pending Forge redeploy of the Governance live-wire PR (Governance/Assurance surface repointed from the 404 /assurance/* + /forge/ledger Forge-mesh routes to the LIVE restraint gate: /restraint/info + /restraint/evaluate + /honest, so the tab populates instead of reading OFFLINE). Live HF Space still serves the pre-fix file. Remove this entry once the box redeploys main and the OIDs reconcile.
accepted_divergences.szl_cheapest_watt.py: ahead=github, pending Forge redeploy of the PowerD3 cheapest-watt PRs (commit b328a846 adds the COPY of szl_cheapest_watt.py into the image so /api/a11oy/v1/energy/cheapest-watt goes live; the module is the carbon/cost-aware placement policy with signed hash-chained placement receipts). The live HF Space has not yet redeployed main, so the COPY-mirror manifest still lacks the file. Remove this entry once the box redeploys main and the module reconciles.
accepted_divergences.web/immune.html: ahead=github, pending HF Space redeploy of the Immune (Hukulla) honest egress-gate page. web/immune.html is image_only (baked into the GitHub-built Docker image via per-file COPY in the Dockerfile, served from /app/web/), the same baked-only pattern as web/energy.html; it is NOT hf-sync mirrored. The live HF Space has not yet rebuilt from the new image, so the live box does not yet serve the file (missing-hf). Remove this entry once the Space redeploys main and the page reconciles.
accepted_divergences.web/materials.html: ahead=github, pending HF Space redeploy of the Materials (Q'allariy) honest Verifiable Alloy & Crystal Discovery page (/materials, /a11oy/materials). web/materials.html is image_only (baked into the GitHub-built Docker image via per-file COPY in the Dockerfile, served from /app/web/), the same baked-only pattern as web/immune.html + web/energy.html; it is NOT hf-sync mirrored. The live HF Space has not yet rebuilt from the new image, so the live box does not yet serve the file (missing-hf). Remove this entry once the Space redeploys main and the page reconciles.
accepted_divergences.web/sda.html: ahead=github, pending HF Space redeploy of the SDA (Space/Domain Awareness — Counter-UAS) honest page (/sda, /a11oy/sda). web/sda.html is image_only (baked into the GitHub-built Docker image via per-file COPY in the Dockerfile, served from /app/web/), the same baked-only pattern as web/immune.html + web/materials.html; it is NOT hf-sync mirrored. The live HF Space has not yet rebuilt from the new image, so the live box does not yet serve the file (missing-hf). Remove this entry once the Space redeploys main and the page reconciles.
accepted_divergences.szl_provenance_receipt.py: ahead=github, pending Forge redeploy of the composite inference-provenance receipt CAPSTONE (commit adds the COPY of szl_provenance_receipt.py into the image so POST /api/a11oy/v1/provenance/receipt + GET /provenance/receipt/{digest} go live; the module composes the REAL immune verdict, the PAC-Bayes bound, the MEASURED/MODELED/SAMPLE energy label, the governed model identity, and the Lean backing into ONE signed Khipu envelope, signature = honest DSSE_PLACEHOLDER). Same baked-only missing-hf pattern as szl_cheapest_watt.py. The live HF Space has not yet redeployed main, so the COPY-mirror manifest still lacks the file. Remove this entry once the box redeploys main and the module reconciles.
